aml.title: AML Screening
aml.page_subtitle: Watchlist management, hit review, and screening history
aml.feature_disabled: AML live screening is not enabled in this environment.
aml.summary_card_aria: AML compliance summary — click to view details
aml.watchlists_empty_body: Load OFAC, EU, or UN watchlists to begin AML screening.
aml.watchlist_refresh_confirm_body: This will re-download and reload all watchlists from source and re-screen all customers. This may take several minutes.
aml.watchlist_slow: Watchlist refresh is taking longer than expected.
aml.hits_empty_body: All AML hits have been reviewed or no screenings have flagged matches.
aml.slow_loading: This is taking longer than expected.
aml.pending_30s_hint: Screening still running — refresh to check progress.
aml.decide_cleared_desc: Verified — not a true match. Customer may proceed.
aml.decide_escalated_desc: Requires further review by the LAC compliance team.
aml.decide_blocked_desc: Confirmed match — customer access suspended pending review.
aml.decide_notes_required: Notes are required when escalating or blocking.
aml.screenings_empty_body: Screenings appear here after customers are created or updated.
aml.no_hits_detail: No hits recorded for this screening.
aml.error_network: Network error. Check connection and retry.
aml.error_forbidden: You do not have permission to view this. Compliance role required.
aml.error_forbidden_decide: Compliance role required to decide hits.
aml.error_server: A server error occurred. Our team has been notified.
aml.error_conflict: This record was recently updated. Refresh to see the latest state.
aml.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
aml.error_invalid_threshold: Threshold must be a number between 0 and 1.

v2.high_risk_stepup_notice: Risk band HIGH — WebAuthn step-up is required for this action.
v2.action_hint: All decisions are logged in the audit trail.
v2.decided_edd: Hit escalated to Enhanced Due Diligence.
v2.apply_verdict_tip: Re-apply this verdict to the current hit.
v2.apply_verdict_disabled_tip: Cannot apply — an active suppression is in effect.
v2.apply_verdict_auto_note: Prior verdict applied from history entry dated
v2.suppress_reason_placeholder: Explain why this match should be suppressed (minimum 20 characters)…
v2.adverse_media_stub_notice: Adverse media results are in stub mode. Live screening will be available in a future release.
v2.adverse_media_no_high_risk: No high-risk adverse media found in this screening.
v2.sar_draft_notice: DRAFT — Not for submission without Compliance Officer review and approval.
v2.sar_submitted_ok: SAR stub submitted. Compliance team has been notified.

cbs.slow_fetch: This is taking longer than expected. Still waiting…
cbs.accounts_empty: No accounts found for this CIF.
cbs.stale_banner_prefix: Data may be out of date — last refreshed
cbs.link_ref_hint: Reference from the T24 transaction you want to link.
cbs.error_cif_format: CIF must be 4–64 uppercase letters and digits.
cbs.error_not_found: Customer not found in T24. Check the CIF and try again.
cbs.error_forbidden: You don't have permission to access CBS data. Contact your admin.
cbs.error_unavailable: T24 is currently unavailable. Try again shortly.
cbs.error_rate_limited: Too many CBS calls. Please wait {{s}} seconds.
cbs.error_proxy: CBS proxy error. Please contact support.
cbs.error_timeout: Temenos T24 is slow. Please try again.
cbs.error_network: Network error. Check your connection and retry.
cbs.error_generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please contact support.
cbs.error_link_invalid: Invalid link request. Check your inputs.
cbs.feature_disabled: CBS integration is not enabled in this environment.

worm.tamper_alert_sr: Warning: this document has been tampered. Hash mismatch detected. Contact compliance immediately.
worm.lock_dialog_warning: Locking places an OS-level immutable flag on this document. It cannot be modified or deleted until the retention period expires.
worm.unlock_grace_notice: This document is under active retention until {{date}}. Unlocking before this date requires a legal hold lift.
worm.notes_placeholder: Describe the justification for early unlock…
worm.legal_hold_lift_label: I confirm a legal hold lift has been authorised
worm.legal_hold_lift_hint: Check this box only if you have a court order or compliance approval to unlock before the retention date.
worm.error_dsar_conflict: Cannot unlock: this document is subject to a DSAR erasure request. Contact compliance.
worm.error_forbidden: Doc Admin role is required to lock or unlock documents.
worm.error_generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
worm.error_not_found: Document not found. It may have been deleted.
worm.feature_disabled: WORM retention lock is not enabled in this environment.

kyc.page_subtitle: Biometric identity verification — ID photo vs. live photo
kyc.feature_disabled: Face Match KYC is not enabled in this environment.
kyc.error_forbidden_hint: Maker or Doc Admin role required to perform KYC face matching.
kyc.consent_required_banner: Biometric consent is required before capture.
kyc.consent_required_note: You must review and accept consent before submitting.
kyc.consent_unavailable: Consent terms could not be loaded. Please try again.
kyc.consent_checkbox_label: I have read and understand the above consent terms. I agree to the capture and processing of facial biometric data for identity verification purposes.
kyc.dropzone_hint: Drag and drop a photo here, or choose a file below.
kyc.file_constraints: JPEG or PNG only — max 5 MB. EXIF metadata will be removed.
kyc.id_photo_received_aria: ID photo received and ready for submission
kyc.error_wrong_format: Unsupported format. Please use JPEG or PNG.
kyc.error_too_large: File too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
kyc.error_process_failed: Failed to process image. Please try a different file.
kyc.error_camera_denied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera permission and try again.
kyc.error_capture_failed: Failed to capture photo. Please try again.
kyc.error_live_required: Please upload or capture the live photo.
kyc.error_consent_expired: Consent has expired. Please review and accept consent again.
kyc.error_rate_limited: Too many verification attempts today. Please try again tomorrow.
kyc.error_feature_disabled: Face match feature is currently disabled.
kyc.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
kyc.result_match_detail: The ID photo and live photo show the same person.
kyc.result_no_match_detail: The photos do not match. Please try again with clearer photos.
kyc.result_quality_fail_detail: A face could not be analysed in one or both photos.
kyc.quality_fail_generic: Photo quality is insufficient. Please ensure the face is clearly visible.

doctype.autofill_floor_hint: Fields below this confidence won't auto-fill into Capture.
doctype.confidence_high_hint: Fields above this skip the 'verify' pill in Capture.
doctype.preview_empty_no_samples: No samples uploaded. Upload samples to preview extraction.
doctype.preview_empty_no_selection: Select a sample above to preview extraction.
doctype.preview_sample_not_found: Sample not available. Select a different sample.
doctype.error_autofill_exceeds_high: Autofill floor cannot exceed high confidence.
doctype.error_forbidden: You don't have permission to change thresholds. Doc Admin role required.
doctype.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
doctype.error_concurrent: This document type was updated by another user.
doctype.feature_disabled: Confidence tuning is not enabled in this environment.

customer360.reveal_dialog_body: Access to unmasked PII is audited. Please provide a business reason for this access.
customer360.reveal_reason_placeholder: e.g. Customer called to verify account details (minimum 20 characters)…
customer360.accounts_empty: No accounts found for this customer.
customer360.documents_empty: No documents found for this customer.
customer360.transactions_empty: No transactions found for this customer.
customer360.workflows_empty: No workflows found for this customer.
customer360.activity_empty: No activity recorded for this customer.
customer360.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
customer360.error_forbidden: You do not have permission to view Customer-360 data.
customer360.feature_disabled: Customer-360 is not enabled in this environment.
customer360.feature_disabled_hint: Contact your administrator to enable this feature.

redaction.confirm_subtitle: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. The original document will be preserved for audit purposes.
redaction.notes_placeholder: Describe why this redaction is necessary…
redaction.checkbox_label: I understand this redaction is irreversible. The text in the selected regions will be permanently destroyed in the new document version.
redaction.manual_hint_inactive: Click and drag on the document to draw regions
redaction.success_toast: Redacted copy saved. Original document is preserved.
redaction.error_no_regions: Please draw at least one rectangle.
redaction.feature_disabled: Document redaction is not enabled in this environment.
